injuries.comment: Hamilton did not finish Thursday's (Nov. 6) game versus the Canadiens and will be evaluated further, per Amanda Stein of the Devils' official site.
The Devils said on Wednesday (Oct. 15) that Markstrom will miss a couple of weeks.
Brown did not play in Thursday's (Nov. 6) game versus the Canadiens.
The Penguins said that Hayes will be a game-time decision for Saturday's (Nov. 8) game versus the Devils.
The Penguins said on Friday (Nov. 7) that Hallander has been diagnosed with a blood clot in his leg and will miss a minimum of three months.
